# clickstack_webhooks (Data Source)

Lists all ClickStack webhooks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clickstack_webhooks" "all" {}

output "webhook_names" {
  value = data.clickstack_webhooks.all.webhooks[*].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `webhooks` (Attributes List) List of webhooks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhooks))

<a id="nestedatt--webhooks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhooks`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Webhook description.
- `id` (String) Webhook identifier.
- `name` (String) Webhook name.
- `service` (String) Service type.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `url` (String) Webhook URL.
